title: Harder Raid
body:
**Hello! this modpack is made for version 1.19.2 & 1.20.1, it may not be finished yet, I will update it. This mod pack is made on forge (IT WILL NEVER APPEAR ON FABRIC, NEOFORGE, AND QUILT!) Modpack making Illager raids unrealistically difficult**

![HaRderRaidText](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5eb103875289fa7919f9e471b46750039754e25.png)

# Harder Raid

what adds Modpack!:
- About 10 new types of raiders
- A huge complication for the raid
- Special sounds
- Bosses that appear on almost every wave

The modpack is made just to complicate the raid and not to complete the game if you wish, you can complete it but almost nothing will change

# Info

- Why is this modpack only for 1.19.2 & 1.20.1? - This version is the best for raid upgrades with the most mods
- Why can you see mistakes in some words? - I don't live in America or the UK and English is almost an unknown language for me, so I use a translator
- Why was this modpack created? - This modpack is made for a real complication of raids if someone is bored with ordinary raids, then they can play it
